scripts.build:www:
node -e "const f=require('fs');const p=f.existsSync('www')&&f.rmSync('www',{recursive:true});f.mkdirSync('www');f.mkdirSync('www/app');['index.html','logo.png','logo.ico','preview.svg','screenshot-home.svg','screenshot-board.svg','screenshot-gallery.svg'].forEach(x=>f.copyFileSync(x,'www/'+x));f.copyFileSync('app.html','www/app/index.html');['logo.png','logo.ico','manifest.json','sw.js'].forEach(x=>f.copyFileSync(x,'www/app/'+x));f.cpSync('css','www/app/css',{recursive:true});f.cpSync('js','www/app/js',{recursive:true});f.writeFileSync('www/_redirects','# Redirect old paths
/app.html /app/ 301
/app /app/ 301
/downloads/* / 404
');console.log('www built');"
scripts.build:android: npm run build:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run build:android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
